analysis.summary: Your resume shows strong technical skills and relevant experience. Consider highlighting more quantifiable achievements and adding specific project outcomes to strengthen your profile.

jobDescription.title: Senior Frontend Developer
jobDescription.educationRequired: Bachelor's in Computer Science or related field

missingSkills.recommendation: Consider adding TypeScript experience or taking a course to strengthen your frontend development profile.
GraphQL is increasingly popular for API development. Consider learning the basics.
Add experience with testing frameworks like Jest, React Testing Library, or Cypress.

strengths.description: Strong foundation in modern JavaScript and React ecosystem
Relevant years of experience match job requirements
Strong educational background with relevant degrees
Diverse project portfolio showing practical application

suggestions: Add TypeScript to your skillset - it's mentioned in 80% of React job postings
Gain experience with testing frameworks to show code quality focus
Learn GraphQL for modern API development
Quantify your achievements with specific metrics (e.g., 'Improved performance by 40%')
Add more details about your role in team projects
Include any leadership or mentoring experience
Include more industry-specific keywords from the job description
Mention specific tools and methodologies you've used

recommendations.title: Learn TypeScript
recommendations.description: TypeScript is highly valued in React development roles

recommendations.title: Add Quantified Achievements
recommendations.description: Include specific metrics and outcomes from your projects
examples: Reduced load time by 45% through code optimization
Led team of 3 developers on critical project
Implemented features used by 10,000+ users daily

recommendations.title: Testing Framework Experience
recommendations.description: Add experience with Jest, React Testing Library, or Cypress

issues: Consider using more standard section headings
Add more keyword density for technical skills
improvements: Use keywords from job description naturally throughout resume
Ensure consistent formatting for ATS parsing
